tr.th: Initial Case Report Trigger Code Problem Observation

tr.td: Disease caused by severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (disorder)

value.displayName: Disease caused by severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (disorder)
Influenza caused by Influenza A virus subtype H5N1 (disorder)

text.paragraph: The patient initially presented on February 16, 2025 with difficulty breathing and fever. At follow-up on February 17, patient reported worsening symptoms including cough. Patient disclosed recent travel to a known COVID-19 hot zone from February 8-14, 2025, prompting SARS-CoV-2 testing.

On February 21, 2025, test results returned positive for SARS-CoV-2. Patient also reported increased muscle aches, headache, and fatigue. Additional testing revealed concurrent Influenza A infection. Patient diagnosis updated to confirmed COVID-19 and Influenza A co-infection.

Patient has pre-existing essential hypertension and type 2 diabetes mellitus, both well-controlled on current medications. Baseline labs including BMP and lipid panel were within normal limits aside from mildly elevated glucose.

value.displayName: Disease caused by severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (disorder)
Pneumonia caused by severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (disorder)

text.paragraph: fever, cough, exposure to COVID-19 hot zone

code.displayName: Relevant diagnostic tests and/or laboratory data

Bilateral ground-glass opacities consistent with viral pneumonia

observation.value: Bilateral ground-glass opacities consistent with viral pneumonia. No pleural effusion. Heart size normal.

text.paragraph: *** In the table below, row entries with values under RCTC columns triggered this Electronic Initial Case Report (eICR)

tr.td: SARS-CoV-2 (COVID-19) RNA panel - Respiratory specimen by NAA with probe detection

list.item: Remdesivir 100mg IV daily for 5 days for COVID-19
Oseltamivir (Tamiflu) 75mg capsule PO twice daily for 5 days for Influenza A
Follow-up telehealth visit in 3 days to assess response to treatment

code.originalText: Oseltamivir (Tamiflu) 75mg capsule PO twice daily for 5 days
